title: MFJ, §1031 like-kind exchange — commercial RE
description: Real-estate investor swaps a TX commercial property for a like-kind FL commercial property. Realized gain $200,000; received $30,000 cash boot (the new property was worth $30k less). Engine computes recognized gain = MIN(realized, boot) = $30k (flows to Sch D LTCG); deferred gain = $170k (reduces basis of received property).
expectations: Deferred gain = $170,000 (basis adjustment of received property)
Federal LTCG portion taxed at 15% preferential rate
